description_long: This stereo sound system features a compact, boxy design with a wood-textured exterior and a darker, reddish-brown top panel. The front face displays two prominent circular speaker drivers, each set within a metallic or plastic ring, and a central control or speaker element. One side panel includes a visible circular port, likely a bass reflex or auxiliary input, while the opposite side has a slatted or vented section, possibly for heat dissipation or additional sound output. The top panel appears slightly angled and may house additional controls or a handle, though no clear buttons or dials are visible. The overall construction suggests a blend of wood, plastic, and metal, giving it a sturdy yet stylish appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, wood-textured stereo sound system with dual front-facing speakers, a central control element, and a slatted side vent. The top panel is angled and finished in a darker tone.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the wood-textured body, dark top panel, and a slatted side vent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a circular port on the left panel and the layered construction of the top.
description_view_2: Front view displaying two large speaker drivers and a central control or speaker element.
description_view_3: Rear or alternate front view with both speaker drivers clearly visible and the top panel's shape evident.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles are circular with a concentric ring design, possibly metallic or plastic, and lack any visible mesh or perforation pattern.
